sentences.target: Ich hole die Schi aus dem Keller.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː ʃiː aʊ̯s dɛm ˈkɛlɐ./

translations.de: Ich hole die Schi aus dem Keller.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː ʃiː aʊ̯s dɛm ˈkɛlɐ./
translations.en: I'm getting the skis from the basement.
translations.es: Voy a sacar los esquís del sótano.
translations.fr: Je vais chercher les skis à la cave.
translations.it: Vado a prendere gli sci in cantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我去地下室把滑雪板拿上来。
translations.yue: 我去地庫攞滑雪板上嚟。
translations.pt: Vou pegar os esquis no porão.
translations.vi: Tôi xuống tầng hầm lấy ván trượt tuyết.
translations.nl: Ik haal de ski’s uit de kelder.
translations.hi: मैं तहखाने से स्की लेकर आ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πάω να πάρω τα σκι από το υπόγειο.
translations.id: Aku mengambil ski dari ruang bawah tanah.
translations.ja: 地下室からスキーを取ってくる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); predicates the clause.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun phrase (plural accusative).
Common noun; plural direct object of 'hole(n)'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular (masculine); determiners the object of 'aus'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'aus' (dative singular).

sentences.target: Sie trägt ihre Schi zum Lift.

translations.de: Sie trägt ihre Schi zum Lift.
translations.en: She's carrying her skis to the lift.
translations.es: Ella lleva sus esquís al telesilla.
translations.fr: Elle porte ses skis au télésiège.
translations.yue: 佢拎住滑雪板去纜車站。
translations.pt: Ela leva os esquis até o teleférico.
translations.he: היא נושאת את המגלשיים אל הרכבל.
translations.vi: Cô ấy mang ván trượt tuyết đến cáp treo.
translations.nl: Ze draagt haar ski’s naar de skilift.
translations.uk: Вона несе свої лижі до підйомника.
translations.hi: वह अपने स्की उठाकर चेयरलिफ्ट की तरफ जा रही है.
translations.el: Κουβαλά τα σκι της προς τον αναβατήρα.
translations.nb: Hun bærer skiene sine til heisen.
translations.id: Dia membawa ski ke kereta gantung.
translations.sv: Hon bär sina skidor til liften.
translations.ro: Ea își duce schiurile spre telescaun.
translations.da: Hun bærer sine ski hen til liften.
translations.ja: 彼女はスキーをリフトまで運んでいく。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular).
Possessive determiner agreeing with a plural noun; modifies 'Schi'.
Common noun; plural direct object of 'trägt'.
Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a goal/destination phrase.
Common noun; dative singular object of 'zu(m)'.

sentences.target: Die Bindung am linken Schi ist heute zu locker.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈbɪndʊŋ am ˈlɪŋkən ʃiː ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə tsuː ˈlɔkɐ./

translations.de: Die Bindung am linken Schi ist heute zu locker.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈbɪndʊŋ am ˈlɪŋkən ʃiː ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə tsuː ˈlɔkɐ./
translations.en: The binding on the left ski is too loose today.
translations.es: Hoy la fijación del esquí izquierdo está demasiado floja.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, la fixation du ski gauche est trop lâche.
translations.it: Oggi l’attacco dello sci sinistro è troppo allentato.
translations.ko: 오늘 왼쪽 스키의 바인딩이 너무 헐거워.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天左边滑雪板的固定器太松了。
translations.yue: 今日左邊嗰塊滑雪板嘅固定器太鬆。
translations.ru: Сегодня крепление на левой лыже слишком ослаблено.
translations.pt: Hoje a fixação do esqui esquerdo está muito solta.
translations.he: היום החיבור במגלש השמאלי רופף מדי.
translations.tr: Bugün sol kayakın bağlaması çok gevşek.
translations.vi: Hôm nay khóa gắn trên ván trượt tuyết bên trái quá lỏng.
translations.ar: اليوم الرباط في الزلاجة اليسرى مرتخ جدا.
translations.nl: Vandaag zit de binding op de linker ski te los.
translations.uk: Сьогодні кріплення на лівій лижі занадто розхлябане.
translations.hu: Ma a bal síléc kötése túl laza.
translations.hi: आज बाएँ स्की की बाइंडिंग बहुत ढीली है.
translations.pl: Dziś wiązanie ha lewej narcie jest zbyt luźne.
translations.el: Σήμερα η δέστρα στο αριστερό σκι είναι πολύ χαλαρή.
translations.nb: I dag er bindingen på venstre ski for løs.
translations.id: Hari ini pengikat di ski kiri terlalu longgar.
translations.sv: I dag är bindningen på vänster skida för lös.
translations.ro: Astăzi legătura de pe schiul stâng este prea slăbită.
translations.cs: Dnes je vázání na levé lyži příliš volné.
translations.da: Bindingen på venstre ski er for løs i dag.
translations.fi: Vasemman suksen side on tänään liian löysä.
translations.ja: 今日は左のスキーのビンディングが緩すぎる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; marks the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the subject.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP modifier.
Attributive adjective in dative masculine singular; modifies 'Schi'.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as object of 'an'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative (3rd person singular); links subject to predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'locker' ('too loose').
Predicative adjective; complement of the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Wir stellen die Schi in den Flur.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ʃiː ɪn deːn fluːɐ̯./

translations.de: Wir stellen die Schi in den Flur.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ʃiː ɪn deːn fluːɐ̯./
translations.en: We're putting the skis in the hallway.
translations.es: Ponemos los esquís en el pasillo.
translations.fr: On met les skis dans le couloir.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把滑雪板放在走廊里。
translations.yue: 我哋將滑雪板放喺走廊度。
translations.pt: Vamos colocar os esquis no corredor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để ván trượt tuyết trong hành lang.
translations.nl: We zetten de ski’s in de gang.
translations.hi: हम स्की को गलियारे में रख रहे हैं.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person plural).
Definite article introducing the direct object noun phrase (plural accusative).
Common noun; plural direct object of 'stellen'.
Preposition governing accusative here (direction); introduces a goal phrase.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Flur'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in' (goal, accusative).
